splits.title: For Time and Eternity
splits.author: Lucy May Green
splits.start_boundary: For Time and Eternity Lucy May Green
splits.end_boundary: over for time and the all altar in the Lord's House they pledged thir troth eternity.

splits.title: Lines to a Mother in Israel
splits.author: Alice Foutz
splits.start_boundary: Lines to a Mother in Israel. Alice Foutz.
splits.end_boundary: Dear Lord, may she with us abide.

files.notes: The file contains two complete articles from the February 1919 issue. The first is a story about temple marriage by Lucy May Green, and the second is a poem by Alice Foutz. There appears to be some OCR corruption in the text, particularly near the end of the first article.
